steps.title: Map the three moves
steps.content: The text defines community science as professional scientists collaborating with amateur enthusiasts. It then lists benefits of that approach and ends by mentioning a Coleman study in which the approach was essential. The study functions as an example of the approach in use, not as the passage's main topic.

steps.title: Reject invented elements
steps.content: B adds public opinion, C adds a development history and future projects, and D says the passage presents study results. Those elements are absent. The actual structure is approach, benefits, and a study that used the approach. The answer is A.
